def: The state or quality of being mountainous.
A retiring of the sea, occasioning a change of high-water mark,whereby land is gained.
Inward sense; mind; understanding; conscience. [Obs.] Wyclif.
A genus of bulbous plants, natives of Southern Africa, namedHæmanthus, of the Amaryllis family. The juice of H. toxicarius isused by the Hottentots to poison their arrows.
To plan beforehand; to intend previously. Cheyne.
To make a lady of; to make ladylike. [Obs.] Massinger.
Indentation; an impression like that made by a tooth.
The planet Uranus, so named by its discoverer, Sir W. Herschel.
Belonging to the Hexactinellinæ, a group of sponges, havingsix-rayed siliceous spicules.
